default_policy.review_rule: Runtime scripts may connect only to the operator-selected Chrome DevTools port on 127.0.0.1. Image generation is delegated to the separately governed host ImageGen Skill.

scripts/injector.mjs.purpose: Discover verified Codex app pages and inject or remove the prepared theme through Chrome DevTools Protocol.

imagegen.fallback: Use a user-supplied asset or assets/default-banner.png and record missing evidence.
